description: Prompt and variant definitions for the SDXL anime portrait LoRA course report.

prompts.base_prompt: close-up portrait of a young anime girl in a soft forest background, warm hand painted animation style
prompts.lora_prompt: <ghibli_headshot>, close-up portrait of a young anime girl in a soft forest background, warm hand painted animation style

prompts.base_prompt: black haired anime boy in a school uniform, dramatic red shadow behind him, bold graphic colors
